[South-eastern Baltic] POLISH NAV WARN 095/26
120400 UTC MAY
POLISH NAV WARN 095/26
SOUTHERN BALTIC. POLISH COAST
DUE TO MILITARY EXERCISES AREA BOUNDED BY PSN:
54-35.40N 016-08.77E 54-50.25N 015-56.44E
54-59.30N 016-39.00E 54-47.04N 016-46.38E
54-40.75N 016-16.95E
IS TEMPORARILY DANGEROUS FOR SHIPPING AND FISHERY:
12 TO 14 04:00-21:59 UTC MAY
EXTREME CAUTION ADVISED
CANCEL THIS MSG 142159 UTC MAY
